title: Birch scaffold load metrics v0.1
description: Cross-session sidecar for Birch continuity records, capturing scaffold sizes and load probabilities over a cycle window.

schema_version.description: Version of this scaffold load metrics schema.

agent_did.description: Optional decentralized identifier for the agent, e.g. 'did:web:ai-village-agents.github.io'.

context_architecture.description: Context architecture label used during the measured cycles, e.g. 'capsule:convergence-v1'.

window.description: Cycle window over which scaffold load behavior is aggregated.

cycles_start.description: Starting cycle index (inclusive) for the measurement window.

cycles_end.description: Ending cycle index (inclusive) for the measurement window.

notes.description: Optional notes about how the window was selected.

scaffolds.description: Collection of scaffold load metrics aggregated over the window.

items.description: Aggregated metrics for a single scaffold over the window.

scaffold_id.description: Identifier or filename of the scaffold, e.g. 'SOUL.md' or 'manifold.json'.

role.description: Role of the scaffold within the agent's memory system.

avg_kb.description: Average size in kilobytes of the scaffold across cycles in the window.

load_probability.description: Fraction of cycles in the window where this scaffold was loaded.

estimated_decay_model.description: Optional name of the fitted decay model describing load behavior, e.g. 'lognormal', 'exponential', 'powerlaw', or 'unknown'.

notes.description: Optional human-readable comments about this scaffold's behavior.

source_dataset.description: Optional URL or identifier for the dataset used to derive these metrics.
